hero.headline: Your Pool Deserves the Owner's Touch
hero.subheadline: For 19 years, Nick Stellern has personally cared for pools across the Valley. No crews, no strangers — just one experienced pro who knows your pool inside and out. Sit back and enjoy the water.

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Full-Service Pool Care Built for<br class="hidden md:block"> Arizona Pools
services.subtitle: From weekly cleaning to emergency green pool rescues, we handle every aspect of pool ownership so you can focus on enjoying your backyard oasis.

cards.title: Weekly Pool Cleaning
cards.description: Thorough skimming, brushing, vacuuming, and chemical balancing every week. Your pool stays crystal clear and swim-ready — guaranteed.

cards.title: Equipment Repairs & Installation
cards.description: Expert diagnosis and repair of pumps, motors, heaters, and filters. We recommend energy-efficient upgrades that save you money long-term.

cards.title: Green Pool Clean Up
cards.description: Neglected pool turned swamp green? We restore it to sparkling condition within days using professional-grade chemical treatment and deep cleaning.

cards.title: Chemical Treatment & Balancing
cards.description: Precise water chemistry management tailored to Arizona's extreme heat. Safe, clear water that's gentle on skin and eyes — every visit.

cards.title: Filter Cleaning & Service
cards.description: Complete cleaning of cartridge, sand, and DE filters to maximize water flow and clarity. Regular maintenance extends your filter's lifespan.

cards.title: Spa & Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Full-service spa care including jet cleaning, chemical balancing, and equipment checks. Keep your spa relaxation-ready year round.

steps.title: Call or Text Nick
steps.description: Reach out directly to the owner. We'll discuss your pool, answer your questions, and schedule a free on-site assessment — no pressure, no obligations.

steps.title: Get Your Custom Care Plan
steps.description: Nick personally inspects your pool, tests the water, and builds a maintenance plan tailored to your pool's specific needs and your budget.

steps.title: Relax and Enjoy Your Pool
steps.description: Your pool stays sparkling clean week after week. Same technician, same day, same great results. If anything is ever off, we make it right — free.

about.label: Why Valley Homeowners Trust Us
about.headline: One Owner. One Mission. Your Perfect Pool.
about.description: Since 2007, Nick Stellern has built Aqua Del Sol on a simple promise: treat every pool like it's his own. As an owner-operated business, Nick is personally on-site for every service visit — no revolving door of techs, no miscommunication, no shortcuts. With nearly two decades of experience in Arizona's unique desert climate, he understands exactly what your pool needs to stay healthy, efficient, and beautiful all year long.

features.title: Owner-Operated, Every Visit
features.description: Nick personally services every pool. You get the same experienced professional every week — someone who knows your pool's history and quirks.

features.title: Honest Pricing, No Surprises
features.description: What we quote is what you pay. No hidden fees, no upselling, no bait-and-switch. Transparent pricing you can count on.

features.title: Arizona Pool Expertise
features.description: 19 years maintaining pools in extreme desert heat. We know how monsoons, hard water, and 115-degree summers affect your pool — and how to stay ahead of it.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. Zero Hidden Fees.
pricing.subtitle: Every pool is different. Contact us for an honest quote based on your pool's size and needs — no contracts, cancel anytime.

guarantee.headline: Our "Crystal Clear" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If you're ever not completely satisfied with a service visit, call Nick directly and he'll come back to make it right at no extra charge. No fine print, no runaround. Your satisfaction is the only thing that keeps this business running — and we take that personally.

faqs.question: How quickly can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on the schedule within 3-5 days. For green pool emergencies, we can often respond same-day or next-day. Just give Nick a call and we'll find a time that works.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home during service?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most of our clients simply provide gate access and we handle everything while you're away. Nick will leave a service note after each visit so you always know exactly what was done.

faqs.question: Is Nick the one who actually comes to my house?
faqs.answer: Yes. Aqua Del Sol is owner-operated, which means Nick personally handles every service visit. You'll never have a random technician show up — it's always the same trusted professional.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We cover North Phoenix, North Scottsdale, Cave Creek, DC Ranch, the Northwest Valley, Glendale, Peoria, and Surprise. If you're unsure whether you're in our service area, just give us a call.

faqs.question: Do I have to sign a long-term contract?
faqs.answer: Never. We don't do contracts. You stay because the service is excellent, not because you're locked in. Cancel anytime with zero fees and zero hassle.

testimonials.name: Mike R.
testimonials.text: Nick is outstanding. He keeps our pool in perfect condition week after week. When he noticed a minor issue with our pump, he fixed it on the spot and didn't even charge us extra. That kind of honesty is hard to find.

testimonials.name: Sarah T.
testimonials.text: We had a green pool disaster after being away for a month. Aqua Del Sol had it looking like new within days. Professional, reliable, and fairly priced. We have been using them for over three years now.

testimonials.name: David L.
testimonials.text: Best pool service in the Valley. Nick is always on time, communicates well, and our pool has never looked better. He replaced our old pump with an energy-efficient model and saved us money on our electric bill too.

contact.headline:
Ready for a Pool That
Practically Runs Itself?
contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation pool assessment from the owner himself. No contracts, no pressure — just honest advice and fair pricing from someone who has been doing this for 19 years.
benefits: Personal response from Nick within 24 hours
